archetype: Electric Neon meets Swiss Brutalism (Custom blend for user's vibrant request)

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for Benefits, Asymmetric layouts elsewhere

surface_styles.neon_border: border border-lime-500/30 hover:border-lime-500/80 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(163,230,53,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(163,230,53,0.2)]
surface_styles.nav: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 w-[95%] max-w-5xl bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4

elements: Links: So geht's, Über mich, Vorteile

hero.layout: Centered massive typography with abstract glowing neon background element. Asymmetrical floating badges for 'Risk-Free' and 'Webdesign aus Müllheim'.
hero.visuals: Abstract neon 3D background behind text. Heavy contrast overlay so text is readable.
hero.cta: Massive Lime Button with WhatsApp Icon

how_it_works.layout: 3-column grid, steps connected by a subtle gradient line. Cards use `neon_border` style on hover. Step numbers are massive and semi-transparent.

about_me.layout: 2-column asymmetrical. Left: Large rounded portrait of Mira Knaup with a turquoise glow behind it. Right: Bold storytelling typography.

benefits.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode). Mix of spans (col-span-full md:col-span-8, col-span-4) to create visual tension. Highlighting technology and the 'Free until you love it' guarantee.

contact.layout: Massive call to action section. Full width card with glassmorphism and heavy lime/turquoise gradient accents. Huge WhatsApp button.

footer.layout: Minimalist dark footer, links to Impressum and Datenschutz (which open as Dialog/Modals).

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary: bg-lime-400 text-black hover:bg-lime-300 font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg. Add icon.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog for Impressum/Datenschutz to keep the user on the single page.
components.cards: Custom div structures using surface_styles (not standard Shadcn Card to allow more creative freedom).

images.description: Vibrant 3D abstract neon design for hero background
Portrait of Mira Knaup (professional woman at laptop)

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons. Add a slight drop shadow to icons (e.g. drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(45,212,191,0.8)]) for a glowing neon effect.

interactions.hover: Buttons scale up slightly (scale-105). Cards glow on hover (shadow-lime-500/20).
interactions.scroll: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and list elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on deep background exceeds 4.5:1. Black text on Lime/Turquoise buttons.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Extend Tailwind theme with font families: fontFamily: { heading: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'], body: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'] }.
Use custom HTML/Tailwind for layouts rather than rigid Shadcn structural components.
Implement the 'Über mich' (About Me) section using the provided portrait URL.
Use Dialog components for Impressum and Datenschutz in the footer so the user never leaves the landing page.
Make the WhatsApp CTAs extremely prominent with the Lime color.

Implement the background image in the hero section with a heavy dark overlay (e.g., bg-black/80 or bg-gradient-to-b from-black/60 to-[#050A09]) so text remains ultra-readable while the neon colors bleed through.
Ensure the bento grid in the Benefits section uses varied spans (e.g., md:col-span-8, md:col-span-4) for visual tension.
For .js files, ensure imports and syntax are standard React/JS, not TypeScript.
